# The Skitch Family Archive

This website preserves the original autobiographical writings of my father, Robert Francis "Bob" Skitch, complemented by a rich gallery of original photographs and sketches.

I have published this collection to share his legacy - a deeply personal journey from a boy growing up in Western Australia to a Lieutenant Colonel commanding the Army Survey Regiment.

His memoirs serve as both a detailed family history and a unique window into the evolution of Australian military mapping and post-war society

The collection is divided into chronological chapters that chart the course of his life and career

To make exploring my father's extensive memoirs as engaging and accessible as possible, I have uploaded the entire collection into a public Google NotebookLM project. NotebookLM is an AI-powered research assistant that acts as a personalised, interactive guide to this specific archive. Because it is grounded exclusively in the provided source documents, every answer it gives is drawn directly from my father's original words and experiences.

👉 Start exploring the life of Robert F. Skitch on NotebookLM

## Documents

- [Junior](https://chris-skitch.github.io/family-history/rfs/1934-1945_junior.html) — 1934–1945
- [The Years Between](https://chris-skitch.github.io/family-history/rfs/1940-1955_the-years-between.html) — 1940–1955
- [In The Navy](https://chris-skitch.github.io/family-history/rfs/1953-1954_in-the-navy.html) — 1953–1954
- [The Army Years - Part 1 - The Young Soldier Surveyor](https://chris-skitch.github.io/family-history/rfs/1955-1962_the-army-years-part-1-the-young-soldier-surveyor.html) — 1955–1962
- [The Army Years - Part 2 - Being an Officer](https://chris-skitch.github.io/family-history/rfs/1961-1969_the-army-years-part-2-being-an-officer.html) — 1961–1969
- [The Army Years - Part 3 - Singapore](https://chris-skitch.github.io/family-history/rfs/1969-1972_the-army-year-part-3-singapore.html) — 1969–1972
- [The Army Years – Part 4 - Now a Major](https://chris-skitch.github.io/family-history/rfs/1971-1975_the-army-years-part-4-now-a-major.html) — 1971–1975
- [The Army Years - Part 5 - In Command](https://chris-skitch.github.io/family-history/rfs/1975-1981_the-army-years-part-5-in-command.html) — 1975–1981
